  'headline': 'Raymond James Downgrades Baytex Energy Corp. (BTE) to Market '

  'summary': 'Baytex Energy Corp. (NYSE:BTE) is one of the best Robinhood '

 {'date': '2026-03-06 17:01:43',
  'headline': 'Baytex Energy (BTE) Releases FQ4 2025 Results, Enters 2026 as a '

  'summary': 'Baytex Energy Corp. (NYSE:BTE) is one of the Low Risk Penny '

  'headline': 'Baytex Energy Corp (BTE) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Highlights: '

 {'date': '2026-03-05 17:07:25',
  'headline': 'Baytex Energy (BTE) Q4 2025 Earnings Transcript',
  'publisher': 'Motley Fool',
  'summary': '2025 was a defining year for Baytex Energy Corp. With the '
             'closing of the Eagle Ford sale in December, we successfully '
             'completed the repositioning of this company into a focused, '
             'high-return Canadian oil producer.  Baytex Energy Corp. is a '
             'technically driven organization with an industry-leading balance '
             'sheet.  As we announced yesterday, Chad Lundberg will succeed me '
             'as CEO following our AGM in May. Chad has been a valuable '
             'partner to me and to this organization, and his promotion is the '
             'result of a deliberate, structured succession process to help '
             'ensure our positive momentum remains uninterrupted.',
  'url': 'https://www.fool.com/earnings/call-transcripts/2026/03/05/baytex-energy-bte-q4-2025-earnings-transcript/'},
 {'date': '2026-03-05 17:07:16',
  'headline': 'Can Baytex Energy’s (TSX:BTE) Bigger Loss and CEO Change Really '
              'Support Its Dividend Commitments?',
  'publisher': 'Simply Wall St.',
  'summary': 'Baytex Energy Corp. has already reported its full-year 2025 '
             'results, showing revenue of C$1,480.82 million, a net loss of '
             'C$603.78 million, and a wider loss per share, alongside a '
             'quarterly dividend declaration and plans to maintain shareholder '
             'payouts. The combination of a much weaker quarter, a steep swing '
             'from prior-year profitability, and an upcoming CEO change has '
             'sharpened investor focus on whether Baytex’s Canadian-focused '
             'model and capital-return commitments can absorb earnings...',
  'url': 'https://finance.yahoo.com/news/baytex-energy-tsx-bte-bigger-170716310.html'},
 {'date': '2026-03-05 13:30:00',
  'headline': 'Baytex Energy Corp. Q4 2025 Earnings Call Summary',
  'publisher': 'Moby',
  'summary': "Moby summary of Baytex Energy Corp.'s Q4 2025 earnings call",

 {'date': '2026-03-05 00:05:01',
  'headline': 'Baytex Energy (BTE) Reports Q4 Loss, Misses Revenue Estimates',

  'summary': 'Baytex (BTE) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of '

             'the stock?',
  'url': 'https://finance.yahoo.com/news/baytex-energy-bte-reports-q4-000501454.html'},
 {'date': '2026-03-04 23:10:39',
  'headline': 'Baytex: Q4 Earnings Snapshot',
  'publisher': 'Associated Press Finance',
  'summary': 'The Calgary, Alberta-based company said it had a loss of 80 '
             'cents per share. Losses, adjusted to account for discontinued '
             'operations, were 31 cents per share. The oil and natural gas '
             'company posted revenue of $545 million in the period.',
  'url': 'https://finance.yahoo.com/news/baytex-q4-earnings-snapshot-231039052.html'}]
